pi_items.source: Task instructions and setup_task.sh explicitly require this path. Verifier confirms this location.
Thunderbird environment setup script (setup_thunderbird.sh) explicitly configures 'Local Folders' to use 'server1'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires migrating Thunderbird's Local Folders to /home/ga/ArchiveDrive/MailStore. The Thunderbird environment configures 'Local Folders' to use 'server1' internally in preferences. The email data is real, sourced from the SpamAssassin public corpus.
